feed.title: Apple
feed.subtitle: Combined Apple feed: Newsroom PL, Developer news and releases, Technotes, iOS/iPadOS, macOS and Safari release notes, and Developer Account release notes.

entry.title: Jutro nastąpi powrót Major League Soccer do Apple TV
entry.content: Jutro, 16 lipca, po miesięcznej przerwie na Mistrzostwa Świata FIFA Major League Soccer powraca do Apple TV.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Madden NFL 27 Arcade Edition przeniesie futbolową akcję do Apple Arcade już 6 sierpnia
entry.content: W katalogu Apple Arcade rośnie liczba rewelacyjnych gier sportowych, a w sierpniu dołączy do nich między innymi EA SPORTS Madden NFL 27.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Apple zdobywa rekordową liczbę 89 nominacji do nagród Emmy
entry.content: W 78. edycji rozdania nagród Primetime Emmy Apple otrzymało aż 89 nominacji dla 15 swoich produkcji.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Firma Apple i Major League Baseball ogłaszają sierpniowy harmonogram transmisji „Friday Night Baseball”
entry.content: Firma Apple i Major League Baseball przedstawiły harmonogram sierpniowego „Friday Night Baseball”, czyli odbywającej się w każdy piątek podwójnej transmisji meczów na Apple TV.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Age rating questionnaire now includes social media questions
entry.content: As announced in June , new Time Allowances in iOS 27, iPadOS 27, and macOS 27, or later, give parents more flexible ways to manage the time their kids spend in apps across categories, including Entertainment, Games, and Social Media. To support this, the age rating questionnaire in App Store Connect now includes questions about your app’s social media capabilities. A social media capability is defined as the ability to redistribute, amplify, or interact with user-generated content through a soci
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: Hello Developer: July 2026
entry.content: In this edition: Try an all-new search tool on the Apple Developer website. Download design kits for Figma and Sketch. Explore the biggest updates from WWDC26 in new activities around the world and online. Read about Apple Design Award winners grug and Cyberpunk 2077. Browse the latest updates to the 27 platform releases, documentation, sample code, and release notes. Read now
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: Apple Creator Studio działa sprytniej i szybciej oraz lepiej łączy się z ekosystemem Apple
entry.content: Firma Apple przedstawiła dziś pełne innowacji aktualizacje Apple Creator Studio – przełomowej kolekcji aplikacji do twórczej pracy.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Design kits for iOS, iPadOS, and macOS 27 are here
entry.content: Apple design kits for Figma and Sketch are now available for iOS, iPadOS, and macOS 27. These include: Updates to Liquid Glass Expanded component and state support Naming changes to better align with code Improved resizing The addition of Dark Mode for macOS Download the design kits from the Apple Design Resources
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: Apple ogłasza zmiany w iOS w Brazylii
entry.content: Firma Apple ogłosiła dziś zmiany dotyczące aplikacji na iOS w Brazylii, które odzwierciedlają niedawne porozumienie z brazylijskim organem nadzoru ds. konkurencji, CADE.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Changes to iOS in Brazil
entry.content: As part of a recent agreement with Brazil’s competition regulator CADE (Conselho Administrativo de Defesa Econômica), Apple is introducing changes to iOS that create new options for developers' apps in Brazil. Beginning with iOS 26.5, developers can distribute apps on alternative app marketplaces, operate alternative app marketplaces, process app payments for digital goods and services outside of Apple In-App Purchase in iOS, and more. The new options for downloading apps from alternative app ma
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: macOS Tahoe 26.6 Beta 2 Release Notes
entry.content: Update your apps to use new features, and test your apps against API changes.
entry.dc:creator: macOS Release Notes

entry.title: New domain for Sign in with Apple and iCloud+ Hide My Email
entry.content: Later this summer, Apple will unify the email domains used by Sign in with Apple and iCloud+ Hide My Email under a single, shared domain: private.icloud.com . New addresses generated for both features will be issued on the new domain. For example: Sign in with Apple addresses, previously issued on privaterelay.appleid.com , will be issued on private.icloud.com . iCloud+ Hide My Email addresses, previously issued on icloud.com , will be issued on private.icloud.com . Existing addresses on the leg
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.content: Update your apps to use new features, and test your apps against API changes.

entry.title: TN3192: Migrating your iPad app from the deprecated UIRequiresFullScreen key
entry.content: Support iPad multitasking and dynamic resizing while updating your app to remove the deprecated full-screen compatibility mode.
entry.dc:creator: Technotes

entry.title: TN3115: Bluetooth State Restoration app relaunch rules
entry.content: Learn about the conditions under which an iOS app will be relaunched by Bluetooth State Restoration.
entry.dc:creator: Technotes

entry.title: TN3193: Managing the on-device foundation model’s context window
entry.content: Learn how to budget for the context window limit of Apple’s on-device foundation model and handle the error when reaching the limit.
entry.dc:creator: Technotes

entry.title: TN3194: Handling account deletions and revoking tokens for Sign in with Apple
entry.content: Learn the best techniques for managing Sign in with Apple user sessions and responding to account deletion requests.
entry.dc:creator: Technotes

entry.title: TN3190: USB audio device design considerations
entry.content: Learn the best techniques for designing devices that conform to the USB Audio Device Class specifications.
entry.dc:creator: Technotes

entry.title: TN3179: Understanding local network privacy
entry.content: Learn how local network privacy affects your software.
entry.dc:creator: Technotes

entry.title: TN3206: Updating Apple Pay certificates
entry.content: Learn how to create, manage, and rotate Apple Pay certificates to maintain uninterrupted payment processing.
entry.dc:creator: Technotes

entry.title: TN3205: Low-latency communication with RDMA over Thunderbolt
entry.content: Learn how to use RDMA over Thunderbolt to enable low-latency communication between clusters of Mac computers.
entry.dc:creator: Technotes

entry.title: TN3208: Preparing your app’s launch screen to meet App Store requirements
entry.content: Understand the launch screen requirement for App Store submission starting in iOS 27 and iPadOS 27.
entry.dc:creator: Technotes

entry.title: TN3212: Adopting gesture recognizers for Sidecar touch support
entry.content: Use gesture recognizers to handle Sidecar touch input and update your event-handling code for macOS 27.
entry.dc:creator: Technotes

entry.title: TN3211: Resolving SwiftUI source incompatibilities for State and ContentBuilder
entry.content: Update existing code for two foundational changes in SwiftUI built with Xcode 27.
entry.dc:creator: Technotes

entry.title: TN3210: Optimizing your app for iPhone Mirroring
entry.content: Test your app and improve compatibility with iPhone Mirroring.
entry.dc:creator: Technotes

entry.title: Apple wprowadza do usług innowacyjne funkcje i inteligentne rozwiązania
entry.content: W ramach jesiennych aktualizacji oprogramowania w 2027 r. użytkownicy usług Apple zyskają dostęp do nowych zaawansowanych funkcji.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Deprecation of the ImageCreator class
entry.content: As we continue to refine our approach to image generation, the ImageCreator class is being discontinued and will no longer work in iOS 27, iPadOS 27, macOS 27, and visionOS 27 or later. When we introduced the Image Playground framework, we included the ImageCreator class as a way for apps to generate images programmatically using the on-device image generation model. If your app uses the ImageCreator class, here's what to expect: Beta OS releases: Your code will continue to compile, but you’ll b
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: WWDC26 survey
entry.content: Share your thoughts on this year’s conference. Take the survey
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: Apple wspomaga rozwój aplikacji dzięki nowym architekturom systemów sztucznej inteligencji i zaawansowanym narzędziom
entry.content: Firma Apple zaprezentowała dziś nowe możliwości sztucznej inteligencji, udoskonalone funkcje zwiększające produktywność w programie Xcode oraz usprawnione platformy.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Apple wprowadza Siri AI – znacznie wszechstronniejszą i bardziej spersonalizowaną funkcję asystenta
entry.content: Apple wprowadza Siri AI – znacznie wszechstronniejszą i bardziej spersonalizowaną funkcję asystenta opartą na technologii Apple Intelligence, rozumiejącą osobisty kontekst, mającą wiedzę o świecie oraz świadomą tego, co dzieje się na ekranie.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Apple przedstawia nową generację Apple Intelligence, funkcję Siri AI i wiele więcej
entry.content: Firma Apple zaprezentowała dziś nadchodzące wersje oprogramowania oparte na nowej generacji systemu Apple Intelligence i wprowadzające Siri AI.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Apple rozszerza możliwości App Store, aby pomóc deweloperom rozwijać się i docierać do nowych użytkowników
entry.content: Nowe możliwości App Store zapewnią deweloperom większą elastyczność w zakresie promowania swoich aplikacji, pozyskiwania użytkowników i zarządzania subskrypcjami.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Apple Intelligence wplata zaawansowane możliwości sztucznej inteligencji w codzienne czynności
entry.content: Apple przedstawia nową generację Apple Intelligence, integrując wszechstronne możliwości sztucznej inteligencji z iPhonem, iPadem i Makiem, aby pomagać przy realizacji codziennych czynności i nadawać im bardziej osobistego charakteru.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Apple zapowiada nowe funkcje związane z bezpieczeństwem dzieci
entry.content: Apple zapowiada nowe funkcje związane z bezpieczeństwem dzieci, które dają rodzicom większą kontrolę nad treściami, komunikacją i czasem, jaki ich dzieci poświęcają na korzystanie z urządzenia.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Z powodu aktu o rynkach cyfrowych wprowadzenie funkcji Siri AI zostaje opóźnione w UE dla systemów iOS 27 i iPadOS 27
entry.content: Ze względu na akt o rynkach cyfrowych firma Apple nie będzie mogła po premierze iOS 27 i iPadOS 27 wprowadzić na rynek Unii Europejskiej funkcji Siri AI.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Find out what's new for Apple developers
entry.content: Discover the latest advancements on all Apple platforms and create even more unique, intelligent experiences in your apps and games with major enhancements across languages, frameworks, tools, and services. The latest SDKs bring incredible new features, including platform design refinements, powerful Apple Intelligence capabilities, and new AI development frameworks. Explore what’s new Install the latest beta software Browse documentation and sample code
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: Introducing Time Allowances
entry.content: New Time Allowances in iOS 27, iPadOS 27, and macOS 27, or later, give parents more flexible ways to manage the time their kids spend in apps across categories, including Entertainment, Games, and Social Media. Time Allowances are developed based on expert research and tailored to a child’s age to give parents a helpful starting point. Parents can adjust these settings based on what they determine is best for their child. Time Allowance categories are different from categories for user discovery
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: Updated Apple Developer Program License Agreement and App Review Guidelines now available
entry.content: The Apple Developer Program License Agreement and App Review Guidelines have been revised to support new features, updated policies, and to provide clarification. Please review the changes below and sign in to your account to accept the updated terms. Apple Developer Program License Agreement Sections 3.1, 14.8: Specified requirements for providing information and responding to questions about developer identity, including in the context of export compliance. Definitions, Section 3.3.3(N): Clari
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: Mini Football Legends, Family Feud Pocket i siedem innych hitów dołącza do Apple Arcade
entry.content: Wielokrotnie nagradzany katalog gier Apple Arcade obejmujący ponad 200 tytułów wzbogaca się o dziewięć nowych gier, w tym My Talking Tom 2+ i Coffee Inc 2+.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Ekosystem App Store osiąga wartość 1,4 biliona dolarów, a deweloperzy odnoszą sukcesy na całym świecie
entry.content: Firma Apple ogłosiła dzisiaj, że globalny ekosystem App Store wygenerował ponad 1,4 biliona dolarów obrotu z tytułu rozliczeń i sprzedaży deweloperów w 2025 roku.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: W Berlinie otwarty zostanie pierwszy w Europie ośrodek Apple Developer Center
entry.content: Jeszcze w tym roku w Berlinie otwarty zostanie pierwszy w Europie ośrodek Apple Developer Center.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Update for Apps Distributed in Texas
entry.content: Due to a recent court ruling lifting an injunction on Texas law SB 2420, new Apple Accounts in Texas are now subject to the law, which introduced age assurance requirements for app marketplaces and developers. As previously announced , this includes age assurance and parent or guardian consent on behalf of minors under the age of 18 for downloads, Apple In-App Purchases, and significant changes associated with an app. Parents or guardians will also be able to revoke their consent for any app the
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: Apple Developer Centers are expanding to Berlin
entry.content: Apple Developer Centers are dedicated spaces designed for in-person developer sessions, labs, workshops, and appointments across a wide range of Apple technologies and platforms. With locations in Cupertino, Shanghai, Bengaluru, and Singapore, these purpose-built facilities bring expert guidance and hands-on learning directly to the developer community. Later this year, Apple will open its fifth Developer Center in Berlin, offering developers throughout Europe even greater access to Apple expert
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: Apple prezentuje zwycięzców konkursu Apple Design Awards 2026
entry.content: Apple ogłasza zwycięzców konkursu Apple Design Awards 2026, wyróżniając wybitne gry i aplikacje w sześciu kategoriach.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Introducing the 2026 Apple Design Award winners
entry.content: Join us in celebrating these extraordinary apps and games. Meet the 2026 Apple Design Award winners
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: All systems glow
entry.content: WWDC26 is just one week away. Get ready for five days of technology, creativity, and community — all online and free. Learn more
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: Uczniowe języka czirokeskiego łączą pokolenia za pomocą iPada i Maca
entry.content: W ramach inicjatywy Community Education firma Apple podjęła współpracę z uczelnią Oklahoma City University i Czirokezami w celu wyposażenia młodych uczniów w iPady i Maki.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Upcoming changes to age ratings in Australia and Vietnam
entry.content: Starting June 18, 2026, age ratings on the App Store will be updated in Australia and Vietnam. Australia The 15+ age rating will no longer be available on the App Store in Australia. Apps currently rated 15+ with the following content descriptors will be updated to 16+: Unrestricted web access Frequent medical or treatment information Loot boxes The new rating will appear on your app’s product page in Australia. Please ensure your responses to the age rating questionnaire in App Store Connect ac
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: W 2025 roku App Store umożliwiło udaremnienie fałszywych transakcji o wartości ponad 2,2 mld USD
entry.content: W 2025 roku firma Apple zapobiegła potencjalnie fałszywym transakcjom o wartości ponad 2,2 mld USD, co daje łącznie ponad 11,2 mld USD w ciągu ostatnich sześciu lat.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Apple prezentuje nowe funkcje ułatwień dostępu i aktualizacje wspierane Apple Intelligence
entry.content: Firma Apple ogłosiła istotne aktualizacje w zakresie ułatwień dostępu oparte na technologii Apple Intelligence, obejmujące nowe rozwiązania dla funkcji VoiceOver, Lupa i Sterowanie głosowe.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Usługa Apple Sports rozszerza dostępność na ponad 90 nowych krajów i regionów
entry.content: Usługa Apple Sports jest teraz dostępna w ponad 170 krajach i regionach, w tym na ponad 90 nowych rynkach.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Konferencja Worldwide Developers Conference Apple rozpocznie się 8 czerwca
entry.content: Firma Apple zaprezentowała dziś ekscytujący program swojej dorocznej konferencji Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC), która odbędzie się w dniach od 8 do 12 czerwca.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Introducing the 2026 Apple Design Award finalists
entry.content: Every year, the Apple Design Awards recognize innovation, ingenuity, and technical achievement in app and game design. But they’ve also become something more: A moment to step back and celebrate the work of Apple developers across the community. Meet this year’s finalists
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: Coming bright up
entry.content: Get ready for a week of technology, creativity, and community — all online and free. Here’s what WWDC26 has in store. Learn more
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: O rany! Dołącz do Bluey i ciesz się najlepszą rozgrywką w Apple Arcade już od 21 maja
entry.content: Apple Arcade wzbogaca się pięć przebojowych gier o wyjątkową przygodę z Bluey, a dodatkowo wprowadza cztery nowe tytuły.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Hello Developer: May 2026
entry.content: In this edition: Meet inspiring developers, advocates, and educators. Prepare your app for Accessibility Nutrition Labels. Meet the team behind the stylish open-world adventure Infinity Nikki. Get the most out of your Apple Developer account. Update your Intel-based Mac apps to Apple silicon. Read now
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: Get the most out of your Apple Developer account
entry.content: A free Apple Developer account provides access to the tools, resources, and support you need to build and test apps and games. A free developer account is separate from an Apple Developer Program membership. Even if your organization holds the paid membership, creating your own free account gives you direct access to downloads and support resources. Don’t have an account? To create your Apple Developer account, sign in to your Apple Account. If you don’t have an Apple Account, you can create one
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: Wdrażanie wersji beta kompleksowo szyfrowanych wiadomości RCS rozpoczyna się dziś
entry.content: Apple i Google współpracują z organizacją GSMA w zakresie wdrożenia wersji beta kompleksowo szyfrowanych wiadomości RCS, zwiększając bezpieczeństwo komunikacji międzyplatformowej.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Jak twórcy filmowi na nowo definiują tę formę sztuki dzięki programowi MAMI Select: Filmed on iPhone
entry.content: Wschodzący twórcy filmowi biorący udział w programie MAMI Select: Filmed on iPhone wykorzystują iPhone’a 17 Pro Max, aby na nowo zdefiniować język filmowy i sposób opowiadania historii.
entry.dc:creator: Apple Newsroom PL

entry.title: Brazilian betting license requirement for App Store availability
entry.content: Following changes to Brazil’s fixed-odds betting regulation, apps with fixed-odds betting (gambling) features can now be distributed on the App Store in Brazil with a valid fixed-odds betting license from the Secretariat of Prizes and Bets (SPA) . If any of your apps include these features (indicated by selecting “Yes” to the gambling question in the age rating questionnaire in App Store Connect), you’ll need to provide this license. Keep in mind that answering “Yes” to the gambling question in
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: To those who build community
entry.content: All around the world, Apple developers do meaningful work that extends beyond great apps and games. They organize events, write tutorials, mentor others, and create spaces to learn and grow. By sharing their expertise and championing each other, they represent the best of the community. Meet some of the inspiring people who are making a difference in the Apple developer community through technical contributions, thoughtful mentorship, and a commitment to helping others succeed. Meet the communit
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: Now Available: Monthly Subscriptions with a 12-Month Commitment
entry.content: Today, we’re introducing a new way that people can pay for your auto-renewable subscriptions on the App Store: monthly subscriptions with a 12-month commitment. This new payment option allows you to offer subscribers more affordable options. People can cancel their subscription at any time, which will prevent the subscription from renewing after they’ve completed their agreed-to payments to fulfill their commitment. To provide transparency, people can easily view the number of completed and rema
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: Lykke Studios: In pursuit of puffy perfection
entry.content: The delightful game puffies. combines the satisfying snap of a jigsaw puzzle with the nostalgic delight of a sticker book. This 2025 Apple Design Award finalist for Inclusivity is brimming with virtual puffy stickers, the sort that ’80s kids would slap on their binders or trade at recess. Players tear open themed packs of vibrant, kitschy decals — maybe punk-rock capybaras, maybe sporty sushi rolls — and place them on a blank sheet so everything fits without overlapping. The stickers are rendere
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: Hello Developer: April 2026
entry.content: In this edition: Join us on bilibili and LinkedIn. Catch up on essential sessions before WWDC26. Build a travel app with sample code. Browse the latest edition of our new design gallery. Learn about the biggest-ever update to Analytics in App Store Connect. Read now
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: How Infold Games fashioned an open world for Infinity Nikki
entry.content: Infinity Nikki is a literally glowing example of what video game graphics can be. The fifth in a series of dress-up titles from Infold Games, Infinity Nikki is also the first to embrace elements of RPG action-adventure. But instead of tracking down weapons and battling bad guys, this installment finds its wide-eyed heroine solving puzzles by collecting enchanted outfits found throughout a series of wondrous lands. Infinity Nikki Available on: iPhone, iPad Based in: Shanghai Awards: Apple Design
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: Q&A: How Plane Finder set itself up for the long haul
entry.content: Plane Finder is a sparkling example of what happens when a small team grows with a platform. Launched in 2009, Plane Finder didn’t scale over the years by adding headcount, vendors, or complexity. Instead, founders Jodie and Lee Armstrong made a long-term bet on Apple’s ecosystem — staying native, sticking close to first-party tools, and reading platform signals early. And over time, an app that began as “planes on a map” evolved into a full end-to-end flight-tracking business — one that include
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: App Store expands support to 11 new languages
entry.content: To help your apps and games reach more people worldwide — especially in India — App Store Connect now supports localized metadata for 11 new languages, bringing the total number of supported localizations to 50. The new languages include Bangla, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Odia, Punjabi, Slovenian, Tamil, Telugu, and Urdu. You can now provide localized metadata — such as your app name, description, screenshots, and more — in App Store Connect. When you localize your metadata, it helps
entry.dc:creator: Developer News

entry.title: Updated Apple Developer Program License Agreement now available
entry.content: The Apple Developer Program License Agreement has been revised to support new features, updated policies, and clarifications. Please review the changes and sign in to your account to accept the updated terms. Definitions, Section 3.3.3(B), Section 3.3.7(K): Specified requirements for use of the Foveated Streaming framework and clarified data privacy requirements. Definitions, Section 3.3.3(Q): Specified requirements for use of the Family Controls framework. Definitions, Section 3.3.7(J): Specifi
entry.dc:creator: Developer News
